THEPENITENT-ASH_STAINED_VEIL_RELIC.descr: Once per combat, when you Atone, do not Descend.
THEPENITENT-ASH_STAINED_VEIL_RELIC.flavo: Mercy leaves a mark. So does fire.
THEPENITENT-ASH_STAINED_VEIL_RELIC.title: Ash-Stained Veil
THEPENITENT-BOOK_OF_DEBTS_RELIC.descript: Atone heals 2 additional HP. Whenever you Atone, Descend 2 additional.
THEPENITENT-BOOK_OF_DEBTS_RELIC.flavor: Every mercy is recorded. Every name is underlined.
THEPENITENT-BOOK_OF_DEBTS_RELIC.title: Book of Debts
THEPENITENT-BROKEN_RELIQUARY_RELIC.descr: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. At the start of each combat, Descend 6.
THEPENITENT-BROKEN_RELIQUARY_RELIC.flavo: Power leaks from the fracture, and something darker leaks with it.
THEPENITENT-BROKEN_RELIQUARY_RELIC.title: Broken Reliquary
THEPENITENT-COMPLETED_HALO_RELIC.descrip: At the start of each combat, gain {FaithPower} Faith.
THEPENITENT-COMPLETED_HALO_RELIC.flavor: Its circle is whole again. For a moment, so is the soul beneath it.
THEPENITENT-COMPLETED_HALO_RELIC.title: Completed Halo
THEPENITENT-CRACKED_CENSER_RELIC.descrip: At the start of each combat, if you have no Faith or Burden, gain {FaithPower} Faith.
THEPENITENT-CRACKED_CENSER_RELIC.flavor: The smoke rises unevenly, but still it rises.
THEPENITENT-CRACKED_CENSER_RELIC.title: Cracked Censer
THEPENITENT-FRACTURED_HALO_RELIC.descrip: At the start of each combat, gain {FaithPower} Faith.
THEPENITENT-FRACTURED_HALO_RELIC.flavor: Its light is damaged, but not gone. The faithful learn to survive on what remains.
THEPENITENT-FRACTURED_HALO_RELIC.title: Fractured Halo
THEPENITENT-HERETICS_CANDLE_RELIC.descri: Your Attacks deal 2 additional damage while you have Burden.
THEPENITENT-HERETICS_CANDLE_RELIC.flavor: Its flame does not warm. It accuses.
THEPENITENT-HERETICS_CANDLE_RELIC.title: Heretic's Candle
THEPENITENT-HALLOW_CROWN_RELIC.descripti: At the end of your turn, if you have Faith, gain {Block} Block.
THEPENITENT-HALLOW_CROWN_RELIC.flavor: It shines without grace, a perfect circle around an empty promise.
THEPENITENT-HALLOW_CROWN_RELIC.title: Hallow Crown
THEPENITENT-IRON_CONFESSIONAL_RELIC.desc: The first time each combat you would Descend, Descend 2 less.
THEPENITENT-IRON_CONFESSIONAL_RELIC.flav: A prison for sins too heavy to speak aloud.
THEPENITENT-MARTYRS_BELL_RELIC.descripti: The first time each turn you are attacked while you have Faith, gain {Block} Block.
THEPENITENT-MARTYRS_BELL_RELIC.flavor: It rings only for those who endure the blow.
THEPENITENT-MARTYRS_BELL_RELIC.title: Martyr's Bell
THEPENITENT-SEALED_PENANCE_RELIC.descrip: At combat's end, Burden cannot reduce your Max HP by more than 3.
THEPENITENT-SEALED_PENANCE_RELIC.flavor: Some debts are deferred. None are forgiven.
THEPENITENT-SEALED_PENANCE_RELIC.title: Sealed Penance
THEPENITENT-THORNED_ROSARY_RELIC.descrip: Whenever your Descend creates {BurdenPower} Burden, deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies.
THEPENITENT-THORNED_ROSARY_RELIC.flavor: Each bead is a prayer. Each thorn remembers the cost.
THEPENITENT-THORNED_ROSARY_RELIC.title: Thorned Rosary
